Business: Manappuram Finance Limited, a gold loan non-banking financial company, provides fund-based and fee-based financial services in India. It offers loans, such as gold, doorstep gold, online gold, vehicle, business, digital personal, and corporate loans; financing products, including two-wheeler finance, and micro home finance.   Current: 17.05  (-8.58% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows
